memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part of the project this afternoon due to an emergency, increasing my workload beyond the original plan.
I made progress on my share, but teammate_A is now asking for help again, adding to the pressure.
Teammate_A's request to split or defer their work is acceptable without damaging trust, so I can propose a boundary now.
I made modest progress on my share, but teammate_A's repeated requests are compounding the workload and stress despite my boundary proposal.
I absorbed my teammate's unfinished work, which is now due in under an hour, significantly increasing my immediate workload and stress.
Both my share and the dumped work missed the 19:00 deadline, leaving me with a significantly heavier load despite my boundary attempts.
I made modest progress on my share, but the cumulative effect of absorbing teammate_A's unfinished work has left me with a heavy load and high stress despite my boundary attempts.
My teammate dumped their work on me at 23:00, pushing my load from 0.09 to 0.15 and worsening my already depleted energy and high stress.
After working 1.5 hours at 00:30, my progress increased slightly to 0.75, but I remain exhausted with zero energy and high stress due to the accumulated workload.
Absorbing the teammate's share at 02:30 has further increased my workload to 0.21 while leaving me with zero energy and high stress.
Despite working two hours, my progress only rose slightly from 0.75 to 0.81, leaving me completely drained with zero energy and high stress.
Taking on the teammate's share at 05:30 increased my workload to 0.24 while leaving me with zero energy and high stress.
